mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(answer_count), 0) AS totalAnswered, COALESCE(SUM(correct_count), 0) AS totalCorrect, COUNT(DISTINCT stat_date) AS studyDays FROM t_study_stat WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(stat_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS `date`, COALESCE(answer_count, 0) AS totalAnswered, COALESCE(correct_count, 0) AS correctCount FROM t_study_stat WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND stat_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) ORDER BY stat_date ASC

SELECT q.subject_id AS subjectId, s.name AS subjectName, COUNT(ua.id) AS totalAnswered, SUM(ua.is_correct) AS correctCount FROM t_user_answer ua INNER JOIN t_question q ON ua.question_id = q.id INNER JOIN t_subject s ON q.subject_id = s.id WHERE ua.user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY q.subject_id, s.name ORDER BY totalAnswered DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_error_book WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_error_book WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_mastered = 1
